name: Football Blitz
author: Poki
description: Are you the next football blitz star? Play against a friend or take the game into your own hands and try out all the different and crazy modes in this fun twist on a classic football game. Switch between your field player and your goalie to conquer your opponent. Controls: Player 1 Arrow keys - Move Space - Kick/tackle M - Switch Player 2 WASD - Move Tab - Kick/tackle T - Switch
